macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: Markets steady as bond yields stay elevated and investors watch inflation
items.summary: A market wrap highlighted that S&P 500 futures were modestly higher while global bond yields remained near multi-year highs, keeping pressure on risk assets. The update pointed to inflation, rates, and Treasury-market dynamics as the main macro drivers for traders.

items.title: Key U.S. economic data due, including PPI, consumer confidence, and housing metrics
items.summary: An economic calendar showed a heavy slate of U.S. releases, including producer prices, consumer confidence, mortgage rates, home-price data, and the Chicago Fed National Activity Index. These prints are likely to shape expectations for Fed policy and rate-sensitive sectors.

items.title: Iran tensions add a geopolitical risk overlay to markets and energy prices
items.summary: Market commentary noted escalating Iran-related tensions as an additional source of volatility, with oil prices and broader inflation expectations in focus. The risk of further disruption to energy markets is feeding into the macro outlook.

items.title: Treasury policy and bond-market signaling remain central to the macro narrative
items.summary: The Treasury Department’s recent focus on exchange-rate and trading-partner policy comes as investors continue to watch the bond market for warnings about growth and inflation. Analysts cited the bond market as an important signal for policymakers and asset allocators.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: Google and Samsung unveil AI smart glasses with Gemini assistant and real-time translation
items.summary: Google and Samsung announced AI smart glasses powered by Gemini, highlighting live translation and other on-device AI features. The launch underscores the continued push toward multimodal, wearable AI assistants.

items.title: Alibaba unveils new AI chip claimed to be three times more powerful than its previous model
items.summary: Alibaba introduced a new AI chip as part of its broader push into AI infrastructure and model development. The announcement adds to intensifying competition among major tech firms to control the AI hardware stack.

items.title: Meta lays off staff in Israel as it accelerates AI restructuring
items.summary: Meta reportedly cut jobs in Israel while reassigning additional employees toward AI-related work. The move reflects a broader industry trend of reorganizing teams around AI priorities and product development.

items.title: Apple shares privacy-focused AI and machine learning workshop recordings and research
items.summary: Apple released recordings and research from a recent workshop focused on privacy-preserving AI and machine learning. The material highlights ongoing industry interest in balancing model performance with user privacy.

items.title: Research spotlight: AI systems may need to forget in order to keep learning
items.summary: A Rice Business researcher argues that lifelong learning systems must selectively forget information to avoid performance degradation over time. The finding contributes to ongoing research on continual learning and adaptive machine learning.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.
